name: formvault
description: Auto-save and restore web form data locally. Chrome extension that protects your form inputs from page crashes, refreshes, and accidental navigation. 100% private — zero network requests.

scripts.package: mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/formvault.zip manifest.json background.js content.js popup.html popup.js popup.css privacy.html icons/ utils/

author: TiltedLunar
